name: Sabayone
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups Tart Red Cherries, fresh or frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the egg yolks and sugar in the top of a double boiler and beat well.
2. Add the wine to the egg mixture. Keep the water in the bottom of the double boiler simmering.
3. Place the pan with the egg mixture on top of the simmering water and whisk constantly until the mixture thickens into a fluffy custard, about 5 minutes.
4. Remove the egg mixture from the heat and let it cool.
5. Fold the stiffly beaten whipped cream into the cooled egg mixture and add the liqueur.
6. Spoon the mixture over the cherries and serve.
Yield: 8 servings
